commands_run: python inline read-only artifact/key summary for JSON and CSV files
python inline repair compact final_probe/posthoc string fields in current report
Select-String target_repository/training_results/current/current_training_run_analysis.json for private absolute path markers

reproducible_launch.status_basis: status derived from reproducibility_contract.json fields, not from run_name
contract_notes: Strict reproducibility inputs and backend readbacks are present for this artifact contract.
reproducibility_limitations_from_artifac: PYTHONHASHSEED can only be fully effective when set before interpreter startup.
CUBLAS_WORKSPACE_CONFIG should be set before CUDA/CUBLAS use.
warn_only deterministic mode may warn rather than fail.
Replay sampling currently uses global torch RNG unless a dedicated generator is implemented.
Epsilon action selection currently uses global Python random unless a dedicated RNG is implemented.

train_side_monitoring.evidence_priority: train-side monitoring is primary factual evidence for this report

notes: recent_train and final_probe are directionally consistent on the tracked training-quality metrics.
recent_train and final_probe are directionally consistent on the tracked training-quality metrics.

definitions.phase_slope_summary_unit: least_squares_slope_per_1000_env_steps; includes full/early/mid/late/last_window for future training-first comparisons
definitions.reward_threshold_note: threshold_reach_steps_reward_custom is intentionally left null in v2 because a stable formal reward threshold has not been fixed.
definitions.formal_acceptance_note: future comparisons should prioritize training dynamics first; final formal acceptance still comes from best.pt held-out final test.

notes: recent_train and final_probe are directionally consistent on the tracked training-quality metrics.
recent_train and final_probe are directionally consistent on the tracked training-quality metrics.

posthoc_selection.evidence_role: checkpoint-selection context; not a tuning decision

best_vs_last_gap_summary_json.direction_note_from_artifact: Positive best_minus_last is better for reward/coverage/success; negative is better for episode_length/repeat_visit_ratio.

supplemental_final_probe.evidence_role: supplemental held-out validation; not standalone superiority evidence
supplemental_final_probe.finite_sample_note: Each final_probe row reports 100 eval episodes; this report treats those rows as finite-sample supplemental evidence.

unverified_items: checkpoint and model-weight payloads were not inspected by design; only source-side checkpoint metadata was recorded
full CSV contents, full logs, plots, trajectories, raw output directories, and binary artifacts were not copied into target_repository
training_summary.txt was inspected narrowly for summary/launch context rather than copied or reproduced in full
final_probe is treated only as supplemental held-out validation evidence
